content:
## Stream 2: Demo Repo (`corvia-workspace`)

### Task 10: Create `corvia-workspace` Repository Structure

Scaffold the demo workspace repo at `/root/corvia-workspace`.

**Files:**
- Create: `/root/corvia-workspace/corvia.toml`
- Create: `/root/corvia-workspace/.gitignore`
- Create: `/root/corvia-workspace/repos/.gitkeep`
- Create: `/root/corvia-workspace/README.md`

**Step 1: Create directory structure**

```bash
mkdir -p /root/corvia-workspace/repos
mkdir -p /root/corvia-workspace/.corvia
mkdir -p /root/corvia-workspace/.devcontainer/scripts
touch /root/corvia-workspace/repos/.gitkeep
touch /root/corvia-workspace/.corvia/.gitkeep
```

**Step 2: Write corvia.toml**

```toml
[project]
name = "corvia-demo"
scope_id = "corvia"

[workspace]
repos_dir = "repos"

[[workspace.repos]]
name = "corvia"
url = "https://github.com/anthropics/corvia"
namespace = "kernel"

[[workspace.repos]]
name = "corvia-adapter-git"
url = "https://github.com/anthropics/corvia-adapter-git"
namespace = "adapter"

[storage]
store_type = "lite"
data_dir = ".corvia"

[embedding]
provider = "ollama"
model = "nomic-embed-text"
url = "http://127.0.0.1:11434"
dimensions = 768

[server]
host = "127.0.0.1"
port = 8020
```

**Step 3: Write .gitignore**

```
